title: Better Questing - Gamestages Expansion
description: Simply adds a task to BetterQuesting to check for if a player gained a gamestage. (Or lost one, if using the invert setting)
body:
Simply adds a task to BetterQuesting to check for if a player gained a gamestage. (Or lost one, if using the invert setting)

Checks both when a player gains a stage, and when a stage is removed, incase you are using a system based on players both gaining and losing stages.
